name: The Doves Type
classification_notes: A faithful digital facsimile of the Doves Press typeface, which belongs to the Venetian/Renaissance tradition of late 19th-century private press revivals, with roots in the work of typeface cutting associated with Emery Walker and the Arts and Crafts movement.
summary: A digital facsimile of the celebrated Doves Press typeface, reconstructed by Robert Green using metal sorts recovered from the bed of the River Thames in 2014.
description: Originally released in 2013 and substantially revised through 2022, the typeface exists in two optical cuts: Doves Text for body copy below 20pt, which preserves the softer ink-spread quality of letterpress printing, and Doves Headline, a lighter and sharper variant developed through work on the Thames Tideway project for use at larger sizes and on fabricated surfaces including brass, granite and steel. The fourth version was redrawn entirely using digital microscope photography of the recovered metal sorts, cross-referenced with printed specimens from an expanding archive of Doves Press publications.
foundry_blurb: Typespec describe the Doves Type as Robert Green's facsimile of the famous Doves Press typeface, a digital reconstruction devised using original metal type salvaged in 2014 from the River Thames. The type was originally created for the Doves Press, founded in 1900 by T. J. Cobden-Sanderson and Emery Walker in Hammersmith, and was famously thrown into the Thames by Cobden-Sanderson after the press closed in 1917. The 2022 revision introduced two distinct versions, Doves Text and Doves Headline, each optimised for different size ranges and applications.

name: Typespec
classification_notes: This is a foundry about page rather than a specific typeface; no typeface classification is possible from the provided content.
summary: A British custom type studio and consultancy founded by Joe Graham, formerly of Fontworks, serving branding and identity clients worldwide.
description: Founded by Joe Graham after his time as General Manager at Fontworks in London, Typespec operates as a custom font studio and type consultancy. The studio works with designers, agencies and branding professionals to produce bespoke typefaces intended as long-term brand assets. Clients include Unilever, Morrisons, Cadbury and Associated Newspapers.
foundry_blurb: Typespec describes itself as an experienced type consultancy and custom font studio offering a wide range of type-related services to organisations worldwide. Founded by Joe Graham, formerly General Manager at Fontworks in London, the studio works closely with designers, agencies and branding professionals to create bespoke typefaces and custom fonts that become invaluable company assets. Satisfied clients include Unilever, Morrisons, Cadbury and Associated Newspapers.
